n1.npc: Oh good, an administrator. The copier ate my quiz. Again.

choices.text: Have you tried off and on?
That copier has beaten better people than us.

n2a.npc: A ticket. So the next ice age, then.

n2b.npc: I've done it so many times it's basically meditation.

n3.npc: Thanks. You're the only one who listens.

n1.npc: There you are. The copier's out of paper and I refuse to negotiate with it empty-handed.

choices.text: I can grab you a stack.
Have you checked the supply closet?
The copier fears you. Use that.

n2a.npc: A hero. Do you know what a full paper tray does for morale?

choices.text: More than the staff meeting did.

n2b.npc: The supply closet and I are not on speaking terms since the toner incident.

choices.text: We don't talk about the toner incident.

n2c.npc: Oh, it fears me. But fear without paper is just a jammed feeder.

n3.npc: Here — take this stack of paper to the copier and we'll both be heroes. Go.
